hits.title: Show HN: We built an AI-powered cold email tool for startups
hits.story_text: After struggling with existing tools that were either too expensive or too complex, we built our own. It uses AI to personalize each email based on the recipient's LinkedIn profile and company data.

hits.title: Ask HN: What sales tools does your startup use?
hits.story_text: We're a 10-person B2B startup and currently using a messy combination of spreadsheets and free tools. Looking to invest in proper sales infrastructure. What's your stack?

hits.title: Why I switched from Salesforce to a $30/mo CRM
hits.story_text: After 3 years of paying $150/user/month for Salesforce, I realized we were using maybe 10% of its features. Here's what happened when we switched to a simpler alternative.
